import { useState, useEffect } from "react"; import { LogOut, User, MapPin, Calendar, Star, TrendingUp, Mountain, Compass, Wallet, Bell, Settings, Search, Filter, Heart, Share2, MessageSquare, Users, Clock, CheckCircle, ChevronRight, BookOpen, Home, Navigation } from "lucide-react"; import { useNavigate } from "react-router-dom"; const Dashboard = () => { const [user, setUser] = useState(null); const [activeTab, setActiveTab] = useState("discover"); const [stats, setStats] = useState({ upcomingTrips: 2, completedTrips: 5, savedTrails: 8, localGuides: 12 }); const navigate = useNavigate(); useEffect(() => { // Get user data from localStorage or API const userData = localStorage.getItem("user"); const token = localStorage.getItem("token"); if (!token) { navigate("/login"); return; } if (userData) { setUser(JSON.parse(userData)); } else { // Fetch user data from API if not in localStorage fetchUserData(); } }, [navigate]); const fetchUserData = async () => { try { // You'll need to implement this API call // const res = await axios.get("/api/auth/me"); // setUser(res.data); } catch (error) { console.error("Failed to fetch user data:", error); } }; const handleLogout = () => { localStorage.removeItem("token"); localStorage.removeItem("user"); navigate("/login"); }; // Sample trail data const popularTrails = [ { id: 1, name: "Annapurna Base Camp Trek", location: "Pokhara, Nepal", difficulty: "Moderate", duration: "10-14 days", rating: 4.8, price: "$899", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1551632811-561732d1e306?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80", featured: true }, { id: 2, name: "Everest Base Camp", location: "Sagarmatha Zone", difficulty: "Challenging", duration: "12-16 days", rating: 4.9, price: "$1299", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1513415564515-763d91423bdd?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80" }, { id: 3, name: "Langtang Valley", location: "Langtang Region", difficulty: "Easy-Moderate", duration: "7-10 days", rating: 4.6, price: "$699", image: "https://images.unsplash.com/photo-1506905925346-21bda4d32df4?ixlib=rb-4.0.3&auto=format&fit=crop&w=500&q=80" } ]; const upcomingBookings = [ { id: 1, trail: "Ghorepani Poon Hill Trek", date: "Mar 15-20, 2024", guide: "Kiran Tamang", status: "confirmed", guests: 4 }, { id: 2, trail: "Upper Mustang Trek", date: "Apr 10-25, 2024", guide: "Mingma Sherpa", status: "pending", guests: 2 } ]; const recommendedGuides = [ { id: 1, name: "Rajesh Thapa", specialty: "Cultural Tours", experience: "8 years", rating: 4.9, languages: ["English", "Nepali", "Hindi"], price: "$60/day" }, { id: 2, name: "Samantha Rai", specialty: "Wildlife Photography", experience: "5 years", rating: 4.8, languages: ["English", "French"], price: "$75/day" } ]; // Stats cards const statCards = [ { title: "Upcoming Trips", value: stats.upcomingTrips, icon: Calendar, color: "bg-blue-500", textColor: "text-blue-600" }, { title: "Completed Treks", value: stats.completedTrips, icon: CheckCircle, color: "bg-green-500", textColor: "text-green-600" }, { title: "Saved Trails", value: stats.savedTrails, icon: Heart, color: "bg-pink-500", textColor: "text-pink-600" }, { title: "Local Guides", value: stats.localGuides, icon: Users, color: "bg-purple-500", textColor: "text-purple-600" } ]; if (!user) { return (
); } return (

))}

); }; export default Dashboard;
